rulings.Case Title: DENNIS CRUZ ET AL VS. MELINDA KAY LOO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Augment Plaintiffs Expert Witness Disclosure
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 31, 2019 line 7. PLAINTIFF DENNIS CRUZ, MARK GILLIAM Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Augment Plaintiffs Expert Witness Disclosure GRANTED. Plaintiffs shall have leave to augment their expert witness disclosure to replace expert witness Richard Devine with Phillip Allman. The Court finds that the instant motion was premised on moving counsel's mistake, inadvertence, or excusable neglect pursuant to CCP § 2034.620. In the interests of justice, the Court determines that Plaintiffs shall pay Defendants a total of $1,125 for expenses incurred in preparing and taking Mr. Devine's deposition. (CCP §2034.620(d).) Hearing required to clarify and substantiate Defendants' request for expert fees of $812.50. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: IVAN VALLADAREZ CRUZ VS. VALESKA CRUZ VELASQUES
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 31, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT VALESKA VELASQUES DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED, with leave to amend.
